title: The Expedition against the Banu Jadhimah
description: In this year the expedition of Khalid b. al-Walid against the Banu Jadhimah took place.770 The following is an account of events concerning him and them according to Ibn Humayd- SalamahMuhammad b. Ishaq, who said:771 The Messenger of God had sent 766. Parallel: W, II, 870.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
